content:
# Best Free AI Tools for Podcasters in 2026

Podcasting equipment can be expensive, but AI tools make professional results accessible for free!

Check out our [[link:/category/Audio|Audio category]] for more tools.

---

## ChatGPT Free: Show Notes & Scripts

ChatGPT is completely free and perfect for podcasters.

### ChatGPT for Podcasters
- **Show notes**: Summarize your episodes
- **Script ideas**: Brainstorm topics and angles
- **Title suggestions**: Help with catchy titles

---

## [[link:/tools/79|Descript]] Free: Audio Editing & Transcription

[[link:/tools/79|Descript]] offers a generous free tier with powerful AI features.

### Descript Free for Podcasters
- **Text-based editing**: Edit audio like a document
- **Transcription**: Get free transcripts for your episodes
- **Studio sound**: Clean up your audio automatically

**Try Descript**: https://descript.com

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] Free: Writing Help

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]'s free plan helps with show notes, descriptions, and social promotion.

### Rytr Free for Podcasters
- **10,000 characters/month**: Enough for regular content
- **Show note templates**: Structured summaries
- **Social posts**: Promote your episodes

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---
